items.title: T. Rowe Price expands crypto ETF strategy with up to 15 assets: Details
items.whyYouShouldCare: T. Rowe Price's expansion into crypto ETFs with multiple assets could signal increased institutional interest, potentially enhancing Solana's market positioning and liquidity.

items.title: XRP flips BNB as open interest builds back toward pre-crash levels
items.whyYouShouldCare: XRP's rise over BNB indicates shifting investor sentiment, which may influence trading dynamics and liquidity flows within the broader crypto ecosystem, including Solana.

items.title: Crypto majors post double-digit weekly gains as bitcoin tests $75,000 ahead of Fed decision
items.whyYouShouldCare: The significant weekly gains among major cryptocurrencies, alongside Bitcoin's price movement, could drive increased trading activity and interest in Solana's ecosystem.
